description:
Goal:
Create a small, testable Python foundation without overbuilding.

Scope:
- pyproject.toml
- package layout
- CLI entrypoint
- config loading
- structured logging with PII redaction baseline
- tests smoke setup

Acceptance:
- CLI runs.
- Test suite runs.
- No browser automation yet.
- No database schema beyond minimal placeholder if needed.
- Logging has obvious PII-redaction guardrails.
title: Create minimal Python project scaffold
